properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’ve found a friend in Jesus, He’s everything to me. He’s the fairest of ten thousand to my soul; The Lily of the Valley in Him alone I see, All I need to cleanse and make me fully whole.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In sorrow He’s my comfort, in trouble He’s my stay, He tells me every care on Him to roll. Hallelujah! He’s the Lily of the Valley, the Bright and Morning Star. He’s the fairest of ten thousand to my soul.

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: Though all the world forsake me, and Satan tempt me sore, Through Jesus I shall safely reach the goal. Hallelujah! He’s the Lily of the Valley, the Bright and Morning Star, He’s the fairest of ten thousand to my soul.

verse.name: v5
v6
verse.lines: Then sweeping up to glory, we’ll see His blessed face, Where rivers of delight shall ever roll. Hallelujah! He’s the Lily of the Valley, the Bright and morning Star, He’s the fairest of ten thousand to my soul.
